title: Optimization & QOL mods
description: A mod pack focusing on the best possible optimization with the addition of quality of life mods
body:
## Modpack Combining Optimization with QoL Enhancements!

Were you frustrated that all modpacks focus either on optimization or quality of life (QoL) enhancements, and none combine the two? I encountered this issue as well and decided to create a unique modpack that merges gameplay optimization mods with QoL mods, perfect for server play and beyond.

## Key Features of Our Modpack:

-**Game Optimization**: Our modpack includes advanced mods that significantly improve game performance, reducing lag and enhancing gameplay smoothness.

-**QoL Enhancements**: You'll find mods that increase game comfort, such as better inventory management, automation of processes, and many other quality of life features.

-**Server Compatibility**: Our modpack is perfectly suited for server play, ensuring stability and efficiency even with a large number of players.
Why Choose Our Modpack?

-**Comprehensive Solution**: Combining optimization and QoL in one modpack is something many players are looking for.

-**High Performance**: With advanced optimization technologies, your gameplay will be smooth and uninterrupted.

If you're looking for the ideal blend of optimization and QoL enhancements, our modpack is designed just for you! 
Discover how much you can gain by merging these two worlds into one comprehensive modpack.

## Find our modpack and experience a new dimension of gameplay!
In the gif below you can see a comparison between vanilla and modpack where the modpack shows an increase of over 882fps!

![77vs959fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b4480299678c77ca03f78bdeb54fd8df24ceab1.gif)
(The test was conducted at a rendering distance of 32 chunks with a chunk simulation of 12 chunks on a rx 7900xt graphics card and AMD 5 7600 processor)
